org.moeaframework.core.variable.Subset

Packages that use Subset
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.core.operator.subset
Collection of operators for subset variables.
org.moeaframework.core.variable
Defines the various decision variables that may be used.

  • Uses of Subset in org.moeaframework.core.operator.subset

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.operator.subset with parameters of type Subset
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SSX.evolve(Subset s1, Subset s2)
    Evolves the specified variables using the SSX operator.
    void
    Add.mutate(Subset subset)
    Mutates the specified subset using the add mutation operator.
    void
    Remove.mutate(Subset subset)
    Mutates the specified subset using the remove mutation operator.
    void
    Replace.mutate(Subset subset)
    Mutates the specified subset using the replacement mutation operator.

    Method
    Description
    Subset

    static Subset
    EncodingUtils.newSubset(int k, int n)
    Returns a new fixed-size subset with the specified number of items.
    static Subset
    EncodingUtils.newSubset(int l, int u, int n)
    Returns a new variable-size subset with the specified number of items.
